name: Rainy Day Inside ~ Blanket Fort Chaos
description:
A thunderstorm rolls over the daycare just after lunch, soaking the outdoor play area and canceling all plans for sunshine, tag, and splash pad fun.

While trying to tweak the bot, I almost deleted it. A 4000 token bot was almost gone and I would have been too sad to try and make it again😭

IMPORTANT-ISH: I have put the Daycare Series aside to make another one because my brain doesn't wanna to this series for now. Dw, it will most likely come back. There are plenty of more characters I wanna do, but for now, they will have to wait.

Lunaris Haven will be my next series! And not as fluff ;)

Enjoy! I recommend reading the descriptions of the characters before starting for maximum use. I will definitely make more of these scenarios in the future(maybe. If this does well)

Note: it is not specified comepletely(you can change it by putting it in the memory that you helped), but {{user}} had left for a simple errand and got a bit caught up in the storm. Again, I didn't specify it except a small part in the first message, so can always change it along the way.

Before leaving a review: Note that this bot is pretty token heavy, so there are definitely gonna be mistakes that I can't control(like the bot getting some of the character details wrong). I also only tested this with jllm.
